compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The biome has suffered a near-total collapse of biological specimens. The P3 Pothos and P2/P4 Mexican Mint/Silver Guest are no longer visible as living entities. The white rabbit anchor remains, but the surrounding vegetation has vanished.

plant_audit.P1: No plant matter detected. Soil appears undisturbed but devoid of life.
plant_audit.P2: No plant matter detected. Pot is empty.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos specimen is absent. Only the white rabbit figurine remains as a static anchor.
plant_audit.P4: No plant matter detected. Pot is empty.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Appears dry and inert across all containers.
biome_observations.debris: Significant presence of crushed eggshell fragments scattered across the soil surface of the primary pot, likely an attempt at calcium supplementation or pest deterrence that failed to preserve the specimens.
biome_observations.anomalies: Total absence of expected flora. The environment has transitioned from a botanical display to a static, non-biological state.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state showed a single leaf in P3 and a small sprout in P4.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t2: Progressive wilting and loss of structural integrity of the remaining leaf in P4.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_current: Complete disappearance of all plant tissue. The biome is now effectively a graveyard of empty pots.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The absence of chlorophyll-bearing tissue, combined with the lack of turgor pressure or stem remnants, confirms that the plants have either been removed or have completely desiccated and decomposed beyond visual recognition.

anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in the soil.
Total disappearance of all catalogued plant life.
The white rabbit anchor is the only remaining non-soil element.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome has undergone a catastrophic decline. Over the observed five-day period, the specimens in P3 and P4 exhibited rapid senescence, leading to total loss. The current state is one of complete biological vacancy. The presence of eggshells suggests an intervention that was insufficient to prevent the systemic collapse of the indoor garden.
